summary: Autonomous pass used the hydrated preflight artifact at main 60c2a9055037a31c43fc03392b2806031e574413. The obsolete representative #45892 is already closed as covered by merged #71409 for the original macOS launchd handoff family. No high-confidence duplicate/superseded close actions are planned: most open PRs are related but distinct follow-up candidates, several have failing checks or unresolved bot review findings, and three refs are quarantined for security-shaped evidence.
